niche: Indian bank IFSC/MICR/SWIFT codes, NEFT/RTGS/IMPS/UPI transfers, and bank branch lookups
audience: Indians searching for a bank branch's IFSC code, transfer rules, or how bank codes work
topicGuidance: Prefer practical, high-intent topics: how to find an IFSC code, NEFT vs RTGS vs IMPS, MICR code meaning, SWIFT codes for international transfers, bank-specific guides, transfer limits and timings. Use accurate RBI/NPCI context.
